name: Hearty Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hot or Mild Italian Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the skins of the sausages; place in a saucepan and cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil, cover and let simmer for 15 minutes or until cooked.
3. Drain; cut into slices.
4. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, heat oil and lightly brown the sausage slices.
5. Add the onions and garlic; cook for 2 - 3 minutes until softened.
6. Add the chicken stock, chopped tomatoes (including juice), frozen spinach, carrots, beans, basil, marjoram, and hot pepper flakes.
7. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and let simmer, covered, for 10 minutes or until vegetables are almost tender.
8. Add the Romano beans (including liquid) and pasta.
9. Let simmer for an additional 5 - 7 minutes or until pasta is al dente (tender but firm).
10. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Thin soup with additional chicken stock, if desired.
12. Ladle soup into heated bowls and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
Serves 6 - 8.
